'''âw-v-f''' ('''kawavaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cockshy|cockshy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-v-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cockshy|cockshy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-v-f
|-
! Lemma
| kawavaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwavaf|thiwavaf]] || [[word:jiwavaf|jiwavaf]] || [[word:shiwavaf|shiwavaf]] || [[word:kiwavaf|kiwavaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwavaf|thuthuwavaf]] || [[word:jujuwavaf|jujuwavaf]] || [[word:shushuwavaf|shushuwavaf]] || [[word:kukuwavaf|kukuwavaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwavaf|thuwavaf]] || [[word:juwavaf|juwavaf]] || [[word:shuwavaf|shuwavaf]] || [[word:kuwavaf|kuwavaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwavaf|thuwavaf]] || [[word:juwavaf|juwavaf]] || [[word:shuwavaf|shuwavaf]] || [[word:kuwavaf|kuwavaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewavaf|thewavaf]] || [[word:jewavaf|jewavaf]] || [[word:shewavaf|shewavaf]] || [[word:kewavaf|kewavaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowavaf|thothowavaf]] || [[word:jojowavaf|jojowavaf]] || [[word:shoshowavaf|shoshowavaf]] || [[word:kokowavaf|kokowavaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowavaf|thowavaf]] || [[word:jowavaf|jowavaf]] || [[word:showavaf|showavaf]] || [[word:kowavaf|kowavaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowavaf|thowavaf]] || [[word:jowavaf|jowavaf]] || [[word:showavaf|showavaf]] || [[word:kowavaf|kowavaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwavaf|thĂŠwavaf]] || [[word:jĂŠwavaf|jĂŠwavaf]] || [[word:shĂŠwavaf|shĂŠwavaf]] || [[word:kĂŠwavaf|kĂŠwavaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawavaf|thathawavaf]] || [[word:jajawavaf|jajawavaf]] || [[word:shashawavaf|shashawavaf]] || [[word:kakawavaf|kakawavaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawavaf|thawavaf]] || [[word:jawavaf|jawavaf]] || [[word:shawavaf|shawavaf]] || [[word:kawavaf|kawavaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawavaf|thawavaf]] || [[word:jawavaf|jawavaf]] || [[word:shawavaf|shawavaf]] || [[word:kawavaf|kawavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawavaf|shawavaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawavaf|goshawavaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawavaf|gokishawavaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawavafnĂŒ|shawavafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawavafnknĂŒ|goshawavafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawavafnĂŒ|gokishawavafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawavafshĂ«|shawavafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawavafnkshĂ«|goshawavafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawavafshĂ«|gokishawavafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawavafro|shawavafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawavafnkro|goshawavafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawavafro|gokishawavafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawavafmu|shawavafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawavafnkmu|goshawavafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawavafmu|gokishawavafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawavafsher|shawavafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawavafnksher|goshawavafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawavafsher|gokishawavafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawavafng|shawavafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawavafnkng|goshawavafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawavafng|gokishawavafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawavafya|shawavafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawavafnkya|goshawavafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawavafya|gokishawavafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawavafyam|shawavafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawavafnkyam|goshawavafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawavafyam|gokishawavafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawavafnĂŒshĂ«|shawavafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawavafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawavafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawavafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawavafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawavafnĂŒro|shawavafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawavafnknĂŒro|goshawavafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawavafnĂŒro|gokishawavafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawavafnĂŒmu|shawavafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawavafnknĂŒmu|goshawavafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawavafnĂŒmu|gokishawavafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawavafshĂ«nĂŒ|shawavafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawavafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawavafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawavafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawavafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawavafshĂ«ro|shawavafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawavafnkshĂ«ro|goshawavafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawavafshĂ«ro|gokishawavafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawavafshĂ«mu|shawavafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawavafnkshĂ«mu|goshawavafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawavafshĂ«mu|gokishawavafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawavafronĂŒ|shawavafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawavafnkronĂŒ|goshawavafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawavafronĂŒ|gokishawavafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawavafroshĂ«|shawavafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawavafnkroshĂ«|goshawavafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawavafroshĂ«|gokishawavafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawavafromu|shawavafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawavafnkromu|goshawavafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawavafromu|gokishawavafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawavafmunĂŒ|shawavafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawavafnkmunĂŒ|goshawavafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawavafmunĂŒ|gokishawavafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawavafmushĂ«|shawavafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawavafnkmushĂ«|goshawavafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawavafmushĂ«|gokishawavafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawavafmuro|shawavafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawavafnkmuro|goshawavafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawavafmuro|gokishawavafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
